playbook.intent: From a stable freelance income, validate and ship a SaaS product on the side, then taper client work month-by-month according to MRR triggers — without dropping below 6-month runway at any point.
playbook.scope: From a stable freelance income, validate and ship a SaaS product on the side, then taper client work month-by-month according to MRR triggers — without dropping below 6-month runway at any point.

success-criteria.criterion: Runway baseline stage complete: Runway dashboard
Validate + scope stage complete: Validated pain note
Dual-track ship stage complete: Weekly time-allocation log
Taper stage complete: MRR / runway / client-roster log per month

stage.name: Runway baseline
stage.intent: Set the minimum acceptable runway; never cross it.

tasks.task: Define MRR triggers for each taper step

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with explicit floor + trigger rules written.

stage.name: Validate + scope
stage.intent: Confirm the SaaS pain is real and scope is tight.

tasks.task: Use Mom Test interviews on 10 prospects
Cut scope to ugliest first version

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when landing converts ≥5% AND interviews confirm pain.

stage.name: Dual-track ship
stage.intent: Ship SaaS in fixed weekly hours; keep client cadence intact.

tasks.task: Set fixed time-box per week for product work
Move repeat clients to retainer to stabilize
Ship v1 to first design partners

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when product time-box held for 8 straight weeks without missed client deliverables.

stage.name: Taper
stage.intent: Drop client hours as MRR hits triggers; keep runway above floor.

tasks.task: Hit MRR trigger 2: drop another or shift to retainer-only
Each step: verify runway still above floor

outputs.output: MRR / runway / client-roster log per month

stage.decision-gate: Never cross the runway floor. If approaching, pause taper and ramp client work back.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content freelance-to-saas-without-losing-runway --format md, agent: faion get-content freelance-to-saas-without-losing-runway --format context, json: faion get-content freelance-to-saas-without-losing-runway --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, synthesis angle'}]
